name: iter_0001_bigru_h128
reasoning_summary: iter_0001 parent=seed_bigru (island 1). Single-axis mutation: hidden_size 64 -> 128 (capacity doubling). HIP-B subset-transfer showed all K in [5,25] match-or-exceed baseline 0.414, suggesting BiGRU at h=64 is capacity-limited OR dataset is information-limited. This experiment disambiguates: if h=128 plateaus near 0.42, the ceiling is dataset-bound; if it lifts notably above 0.45, the seed was under-parameterized. Training seed 42 -> 101 avoids retesting baseline exactly. K=10 per HIP-B. Param count ~8k (well under 10M cap). Stage 0 family, all four constraints expected to pass clean.
